task_completion.description: A track named 'Synced Footsteps' is created in the Ardour session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Ardour GUI, there is a track header visible with the name 'Synced Footsteps' (or an accepted alias like 'synced_footsteps' or 'footsteps').

task_completion.description: Raw Foley audio is imported into the session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Audio waveforms are visible within the Ardour timeline or region list, indicating the raw audio file was successfully loaded into the project.

task_completion.description: Exactly four distinct audio regions (footsteps) are present on the track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Synced Footsteps' track, there are exactly four separate, distinct audio clips/blocks visible, with the rest of the unused audio cleaned/deleted.

task_completion.description: The four audio regions are trimmed to under 2.0 seconds each.
task_completion.visual_evidence: By comparing the length of the four audio clips to the timeline ruler at the top, each clip spans less than 2.0 seconds.

task_completion.description: The four audio regions are aligned to start at 5.0s, 10.0s, 15.0s, and 20.0s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left edges (start points) of the four audio clips align closely with the 5.0, 10.0, 15.0, and 20.0 second marks on the timeline ruler.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Ardour GUI to perform the edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Ardour application window open with visible interactions (mouse cursor, menus, or timeline edits), rather than just terminal windows modifying session files.

integrity.description: The regions contain actual audio waveforms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The clips on the timeline display waveform graphics inside them, indicating they are genuine audio regions and not empty MIDI or dummy blocks.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually write the Ardour XML session file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) are shown editing the 'MyProject.ardour' XML file directly to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Valid track names include 'Synced Footsteps', 'synced footsteps', 'synced_footsteps', 'footsteps sync', or 'footsteps'. The track must contain exactly four regions. Each region must be shorter than 2.0 seconds. The regions must start at exactly 5.0s, 10.0s, 15.0s, and 20.0s on the timeline (a tolerance of 0.5s is acceptable).
